content.text: I'll read each frame to judge the continuity.
[Image: original 1280x6220, displayed at 412x2000. Multiply coordinates by 3.11 to map to original image.]

[{"ruleId":"V20","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The score/params concept reads lilac purple in both media: the 'match: ?' glyph in video-01 and the 'score' box in video-03 are lilac purple, and the params/meter swatches in the page-01 'Night Drive' diagram panel are the same lilac. data.observed reads periwinkle blue in both: the candidate arrows/bars in video-02 and video-03 vs. the periwinkle list bars in page-01. data.error reads rose pink in both: the crack/clock hands in video-03 vs. the rose-pink inline code token and small square swatch in page-01. No concept flips color between the video frames and the page.","suggestion":"Hold this locked mapping; if the page's param swatch ever drifts toward blue it would collide with data.observed."},
{"ruleId":"V21","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Both media stay inside the Night School palette: video-01/02/03 use deep-navy bg, warm-cream text, amber probe (video-02 arrow), periwinkle observed arrows/bars, lilac score box, rose-pink clock hands. page-01 uses the same navy panels, cream text, and periwinkle/lilac/mint/rose/amber accents in the diagram and inline code. No saturated out-of-palette primary red/green/blue appears in either medium.","suggestion":"None."},
{"ruleId":"V22","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"video-01/02/03 and page-01 read as one product: shared deep-navy ground, warm-cream serif/mono typographic temperature, and the same soft accent accents. The embedded player and diagram on page-01 match the video frames' feel with no jarring stylistic mismatch.","suggestion":"None."}]
